_meta.method: 5 parallel extraction sub-agents (sonnet) over each set's routed + path-aware verification artifacts; aggregated + de-confounded by the orchestrator (opus). Findings cite the harvester artifacts.

surfaces.routed: single cross-provider API session-verification (snippet/diff-fed, NOT path-aware), per-session, ran FIRST, rounds R1..Rn
surfaces.path_aware: GitHub Copilot driving GPT-5.4 AND Gemini-Pro separately (full repo access, probes), usually closeout/set-wide, ran SECOND (except 008 where it ran first)

routed.note: only routed-only finding was a FALSE POSITIVE (S3 R1 evidence-packaging gap, no code change)

critique_only_real.defect: H4 TypeSuffix not bridged to ReturnType (suffixed fn projects Void)

sets.notes: Order REVERSED here (path-aware first). Path-aware caught 2 real Majors routed never saw; routed caught 0 real defects.

critique_only_real.defect: DA-1 'matches RunParse' overclaim (UTF-16 BE BOM divergence)
DA-2 'all fixtures ASCII' overclaim (DatabaseYaml has 92 non-ASCII)

routed_only_real.defect: BOM contract validated by inspection only

both.note: routed found upstream gap; path-aware found post-fix nuance

false_positives.defect: DA-4 wrong-layer escalated to Major MUST_FIX

sets.notes: Closest the corpus comes to routed pulling weight: 3 real Minor TEST-RIGOR catches (a distinct class). All Minor. Gemini over-escalated twice; GPT (path-aware) disproved both.

critique_only_real.defect: MakeTable (SELECT..INTO) emits Sql.Parsed.QueryType='Select', contradicts DAO QueryTypeCode
numeric regex rejects valid .5 / 1. -> degrades real data to NULL

routed_only_real.defect: DAO code 144 label collision + Q11 exclusion

sets.notes: CLEAN PROVIDER-MULTIPLICITY ISOLATION: both critique-only catches were Gemini-ONLY; GPT-path-aware (same provider as routed validator) ALSO missed them. Here context-access (via GPT) did NOT help; the second provider did.

routed.note: S3 had NO routed verification (path-aware only); S1 routed findings were disproven false positives

path_aware.order_vs_routed: SECOND; only 2-round path-aware set in corpus

critique_only_real.defect: C1 interpretation-guide join-key misdirection (TargetName vs nonexistent Name)
C7b Resolved ref can target VBA_RESOLVE_FAILURE stub

sets.notes: C9 = the headline. R2-1/R2-2 = GPT caught errors in the orchestrator's OWN R1 fixes (the 2nd-round value). Provider split: C9 both, C1/R2-1/R2-2 GPT-only, C7b Gemini-only.

critique_only_real.defect: C3 form/report name-collision overwrites owner kind -> fabricated Report endpoint (WRONG DATA)
critique_only_real.note: routed gpt-5-4 VERIFIED across R1-R4; explicitly judged 'low-risk hardening, not a blocker'

routed_only_real.defect: S2 TempVars regex fabricates edges (not token-aware)
routed_only_real.note: took routed 3 rounds to fully close; path-aware out of scope (S2)

routed_only_real.defect: S2 object-level embedded macro silent drop

both.defect: C4 non-bang TempVars setter forms miss supplier edge

sets.same_provider_isolation: gpt-5-4 was BOTH routed validator AND a path-aware provider. Routed-GPT (snippet) missed C3 across R1-R4; path-aware-GPT (full repo) caught it. Single isolation variable = context mode. CLEAN context-access evidence.
sets.notes: C3 = strongest existence proof (4 routed rounds, wrong-data, stage=original so order does not excuse routed). Routed also caught 3 real Majors in S1/S2 work path-aware did not cover (out-of-scope, not a clean miss).

critique_only_by_provider.interpretation: NEITHER provider alone catches all; GPT-only misses 010's two Majors + C7b; Gemini-only misses C1/R2-1/R2-2. Provider-multiplicity is load-bearing WITHIN path-aware.

aggregate.routed_only_caveat: ALL routed-only catches are order-confounded (path-aware saw post-fix code) or out-of-scope (different session). NO clean case of routed catching a real defect path-aware missed on the same code. Routed catches cluster in build-time implementation defects + test-rigor (009) -> plausibly CADENCE value, not unique capability. UNTESTED -> forward A/B.

clean_isolations.context_access: 012 C3 (same-provider GPT: snippet miss -> repo catch)
clean_isolations.provider_diversity: 010 (GPT-path-aware missed; Gemini-only caught) — context-access alone insufficient there; this is a provider-specific blind spot (diversity), NOT the full two-reviewer multiplicity effect (that needs the forward pair-vs-single comparison)

aggregate.false_positive_cost: Gemini over-escalated twice in 009 (DA-2/DA-4 Major MUST_FIX), both disproven by GPT probes. Path-aware is not noise-free; the 2-provider cross-check is part of its reliability.
